title: Creamy German Seafood Stir-fry
description: A herbal and creamy German dish featuring frozen seafood mix, air-fried to perfection for a whole30-friendly show-off meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix the frozen seafood with garlic powder and olive oil until evenly coated.
Arrange the coated seafood in an even layer inside the air fryer basket.
Air-fry for about 12 minutes or until fully cooked. Toss occasionally during cooking.
Drain any excess grease from the seafood into a small saucepan, leaving the oil.
In the same pan over medium heat, add heavy cream and bring to a gentle simmer.
Stir in the garlic powder mixture once it's incorporated well.
Garnish with chopped chives before serving.
